message:
fix(rpc): replace polling drain with WaitGroup in Stop() to prevent storage-close race (bd-11)

Stop() used busy-polling on an atomic counter with a hard 5-second timeout
to drain in-flight connections. After timeout, storage would close even if
connections were still active, causing use-after-close on storage.

Replace with sync.WaitGroup that properly blocks until all connection
goroutines exit. Keep the atomic counter for metrics/diagnostics. The
5-second timeout remains as a safety net but the WaitGroup ensures
correct synchronization when connections drain within the deadline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
